name: kineticchromatictext
title: Kinetic Chromatic Text
description: A "God-Tier" Chromatic Typographic Effect (#265). Features: - Hypnotic Rainbow Flow: A slow, seamless color gradient through the text. - Prismatic RGB Split: Text splits into R, G, B channels on hover (Chromatic Aberration). - Volumetric Pulsing Glow: A soft neon aura behind the characters. - Pure Text Effect: Zero background dependencies.
